result.reason: To provide a global setting for users to hide all MultiSSH related UI elements, improving UI customization.
result.approach: Implement a new application setting to control the overall visibility of MultiSSH UI elements (toolbar, view menu item, and connection context menu items). This will involve adding a setting, a corresponding option in the UI, and integrating this setting into the logic that controls the visibility of the MultiSSH toolbar and menu items.
